threats.title: cPanel CVE-2026-41940 Under Active Exploitation to Deploy Filemanager Backdoor
threats.summary: A threat actor named Mr_Rot13 has been attributed to the exploitation of a recently disclosed critical cPanel flaw to deploy a backdoor codenamed Filemanager on compromised environments. threats.title: Hackers Used AI to Develop First Known Zero-Day 2FA Bypass for Mass Exploitation
threats.summary: Google on Monday disclosed that it identified an unknown threat actor using a zero-day exploit that it said was likely developed with an artificial intelligence (AI) system, marking the first time the technology has been put to use in the wild in a malicious context for vulnerability discovery and exploit generation. threats.title: Your Purple Team Isn't Purple — It's Just Red and Blue in the Same Room

threats.title: Fake OpenAI Privacy Filter Repo Hits #1 on Hugging Face, Draws 244K Downloads
threats.summary: A malicious Hugging Face repository managed to take a spot in the platform's trending list by impersonating OpenAI's Privacy Filter open-weight model to deliver a Rust-based information stealer to Windows users.
